JSB06103.JPG.alt: Beautifully decorated Ganesh idol surrounded by fresh flowers and warm lights for the Bhaath-Kapod ceremony
JSB06103.JPG.caption: গণেশের আশীর্বাদে — the ceremony begins under Ganesh's benevolent gaze

RAH00004.JPG.alt: Traditional Bengali thali with rice, dal, fish, sweets and a folded sari — the bhaath-kapod offering
RAH00004.JPG.caption: ভাত-কাপড় — rice, fish, sweets and a sari, the bride's first gifts from her new home

RAH00013.JPG.alt: Rituparna and Shoumo smiling together, holding the ceremonial plate of sweets
RAH00013.JPG.caption: মিষ্টি হাতে, হাসি মুখে — sweets in hand, joy in heart

RAH00014.JPG.alt: Rituparna and Shoumo posing with the ceremonial plate, radiant in red
RAH00014.JPG.caption: Together they hold the plate — together they hold a new beginning

RAH00016.JPG.alt: Shoumo presenting the sari and gifts to Rituparna, both exchanging warm smiles
RAH00016.JPG.caption: কাপড় দেওয়া — Shoumo presents the sari, a promise wrapped in silk

RAH00020.JPG.alt: Rituparna and Shoumo holding the gifts together, beaming with happiness
RAH00020.JPG.caption: Two hands, one offering — the beauty of shared beginnings

RAH00028.JPG.alt: Rituparna bowing to touch Shoumo's feet in a tender pranam gesture
RAH00028.JPG.caption: প্রণাম — Rituparna bows with grace, love in every gesture

RAH00033.JPG.alt: Family group photo with Rituparna and Shoumo surrounded by women of the family in colourful saris
RAH00033.JPG.caption: পরিবারের মেয়েরা — the women who make every ceremony complete

RAH00037.JPG.alt: Rituparna and Shoumo sitting together on the couch, laughing while eating from the thali
RAH00037.JPG.caption: ভাত খাওয়া — the first meal together, laughter as the best seasoning

RAH00040.JPG.alt: Rituparna playfully feeding Shoumo a piece of fish while both laugh
RAH00040.JPG.caption: মাছ খাওয়ানো — she feeds him fish, because love is in the little things

RAH00052.JPG.alt: Rituparna lovingly feeding Shoumo a sweet morsel as they sit together on the couch
RAH00052.JPG.caption: মিষ্টিমুখ — a sweet bite from the one you love tastes different

RAH00063.JPG.alt: Rituparna and Shoumo reclining on the couch together in a candid, intimate moment
RAH00063.JPG.caption: একসাথে — side by side, this is where forever feels like home

RAH00065.JPG.alt: Overhead view of Rituparna and Shoumo reclining together, a tender and intimate portrait
RAH00065.JPG.caption: উপর থেকে দেখা — from above, two lives perfectly intertwined
